to_pdpc.reason: Breach involves NRIC of 450 individuals, meeting the significant harm threshold under PDPA s.26B.

to_individuals.reason: Breach is likely to result in significant harm (identity theft/fraud risk) given NRIC and contact details exposure.

containment_actions: Access credentials rotated for all affected systems
remediation_plan: Mandatory device encryption policy enforced across firm
All staff to complete PDPA refresher training within 14 days
Review vendor data access and tighten least-privilege permissions
